problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: If Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
